description: As the VP of Sales at a financial services technology firm, audit the SuiteCRM pipeline to resolve data quality issues ahead of an investor presentation. Ensure all opportunities are compliant with the following standards: deals in an active stage with close dates more than 60 days in the past must be 'Closed Lost' with 0% probability, probabilities must align with sales stages according to standard CRM conventions, and 'Closed Won' deals must have close dates in the past. Do not modify records that are already internally consistent.
